text.title: Tech Debt Management Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure from "scored register in hand" to "plan committed + gates wired".

step.name: classify
step.action: For each item above threshold: classify as localized vs broad; small vs large.

step.name: assign-strategy
step.action: Map per r1: low → Boy Scout; medium localized → feature-attached; high localized → dedicated-sprint; high broad → strangler-fig.
step.decision-gate: If item's classification + strategy mismatch — STOP and reconsider.

step.name: declare-exit
step.action: Write exit_criterion per strategy: LoC drop, feature ship, sprint closed, traffic %. Observable, datable.
step.decision-gate: If criterion unobservable — STOP, verdict block-no-exit-criteria.

step.name: wire-gate
step.action: Add or extend a CI gate that detects re-introduction of the debt category. Reuse existing rule kinds: ruff / eslint / regex / loc-cap / complexity-cap.
step.decision-gate: If no mechanical gate feasible — STOP, verdict block-no-gate.

step.name: schedule
step.action: Insert items into the right place: Boy Scout into team-handbook rule; feature-attached as labels on tickets; dedicated-sprint with a target_sprint; Strangler Fig as an epic.
step.decision-gate: If schedule conflicts with existing roadmap — escalate.
